summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 newly implemented features completed: Account Page (password change, subscription display), Chapter inline editing. All backend (18/18) and frontend tests passed.
passed_tests: Account Page - Admin login successful
GET /api/account/subscription - returns is_admin=true, is_active=true, can_cancel=false for admin
GET /api/account/subscription - returns correct plan_details (name: Administrateur, price: 0, unlimited)
GET /api/account/subscription - requires authentication (401)
POST /api/account/change-password - success with correct current password
POST /api/account/change-password - returns 'Mot de passe actuel incorrect' with wrong password
POST /api/account/change-password - validates min 6 characters for new password
POST /api/account/change-password - requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - edits chapter content successfully
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - sets edited_manually=true flag
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - persists changes in database
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - rejects invalid chapter numbers (400)
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - requires authentication (401)
PUT /api/books/{book_id}/chapters/{chapter_num} - returns 404 for non-existent book
GET /api/books - requires authentication (redirects to 401)
GET /api/books - returns only authenticated user's books
POST /api/account/cancel-subscription - admin cannot cancel (400)
POST /api/account/reactivate-subscription - fails without stripe subscription (400)
Regular user registration and password change flow
UI: Account page displays user name and email correctly
UI: Account page shows Administrateur badge with crown icon
UI: Account page shows 'Accès illimité' for admin subscription
UI: Account page shows usage stats (Livres ce mois, Chapitres max/livre, Crédits)
UI: Account page password form has all 3 fields (current, new, confirm)
UI: Password mismatch shows toast error 'Les mots de passe ne correspondent pas'
UI: /account redirects to /login?redirect=/account when not authenticated
UI: Book view shows Edit button (Éditer) on completed chapters
UI: Clicking Edit opens textarea editor with chapter content
UI: Chapter editor shows Save (Sauvegarder) and Cancel (Annuler) buttons
UI: Cancel button closes editor without saving
UI: Save button persists changes and shows success toast 'Chapitre sauvegardé avec succès!'
UI: Edited chapters show '(modifié manuellement)' indicator
seed_data_creation: Created test user with prefix 'test.account.' - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features verified working: 1) Account Page at /account shows personal info, admin subscription with crown icon and 'Accès illimité', password change form with validation. 2) Password change endpoint correctly verifies current password before allowing change. 3) Chapter inline editing on BookView page - Edit button opens textarea, Save persists with edited_manually flag, Cancel discards changes. Book ID 77576020-db4e-486e-9c05-c06d0ae3da8c used for chapter editing tests.

password_change.success_message: Mot de passe modifié avec succès
